anti_overclaim: live GitHub coherence does not prove research validity
live GitHub coherence does not prove livestream health
live GitHub coherence does not prove support readiness
live GitHub coherence does not prove artifact rights
live GitHub coherence does not prove monetization readiness

closed_repo_pres_claims.summary: License policy closed state compared to GitHub detected license.
NOTICE link closure compared to live CONTRIBUTING.md presence.
Issue redirect-wall closure compared to has_issues and community profile state.
Profile README closure compared to current organization-profile README docs and repo state.
hapax-assets CDN/public visibility claim compared to live repo and Pages state.

docs_evidence.organization_profile_requirement: An organization profile README uses a public .github repository with profile/README.md.
docs_evidence.user_profile_requirement: A user profile README requires a public repository whose name matches the GitHub username and contains a non-empty root README.md.

drift_findings.expected: GitHub public license surfaces align to CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0.
drift_findings.summary: GitHub detected license does not match the repo registry policy.

drift_findings.expected: GitHub public license surfaces align to PolyForm-Strict-1.0.0.
drift_findings.summary: GitHub detected license does not match the repo registry policy.

drift_findings.expected: Live GitHub visibility is public before public material names the repo.
drift_findings.summary: An intended public first-party repo is not publicly visible.

drift_findings.expected: Live GitHub visibility is public before public material names the repo.
drift_findings.summary: An intended public first-party repo is not publicly visible.

drift_findings.expected: Live GitHub visibility is public before public material names the repo.
drift_findings.summary: An intended public first-party repo is not publicly visible.

drift_findings.expected: GitHub public license surfaces align to PolyForm-Strict-1.0.0.
drift_findings.summary: GitHub/root license detection contradicts the repo registry policy.

drift_findings.expected: Governance/refusal posture is surfaced by a live public file.
drift_findings.observed: GOVERNANCE.md is not present on the default branch.
drift_findings.summary: GOVERNANCE.md is missing from the public repo root.

drift_findings.expected: Issue/refusal posture either matches has_issues or is marked unreconciled.
drift_findings.summary: Issues are enabled while GitHub does not report an issue template.

drift_findings.expected: README/profile copy cites current project-spine evidence and report head.
drift_findings.observed: README predates this live-state report and cannot claim reconciled state.
drift_findings.summary: README currentness must be regenerated after live-state reconciliation.

drift_findings.expected: Metadata license, preferred citation, and DOI posture agree with live surfaces.
drift_findings.observed: Metadata cannot be treated as coherent while GitHub detects a contradictory license.
drift_findings.summary: Citation/CodeMeta/Zenodo metadata must be reconciled after license drift.

drift_findings.expected: GitHub organization profile README lives in public hapax-systems/.github with profile/README.md.
drift_findings.summary: Organization profile README is present at the selected Hapax Systems path.

drift_findings.expected: Every public NOTICE link resolves to an existing public path.
drift_findings.summary: NOTICE links resolve against the current local public-surface evidence.

drift_findings.expected: Public CDN claims cite a live Pages state.
drift_findings.observed: hapax-assets is public and Pages API returned a site.
drift_findings.summary: hapax-assets is visible with a readable GitHub Pages state.

drift_findings.expected: Package-public surfaces inherit the repo refusal/claim ceiling before refresh.
drift_findings.summary: Some package README/PyPI surfaces contain issue/support language needing claim discipline.

drift_findings.expected: Closed task records remain immutable, but false live claims feed drift.
drift_findings.summary: Closed repo-pres task claims were compared to live state.
